titlestmt.titleproper: Cornell University commencement programs and related materials37-8-346
titlestmt.author: Compiled by T.A. Gobert

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2023-09-07 00:00:20 UTC.
profiledesc.langusage: Description is written in: Undetermined, Code for undetermined script script.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Cornell University commencement programs and related materials
did.physdesc: Included are announcements, invitations, tickets, programs, lists of degree candidates, and other items relating to Cornell University Commencement, Baccalaureate Services, Class Day celebrations amd Senior Week activities. Also some items pertaining to ceremonies held by various colleges of the university.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Cornell University commencement programs and class printed materials, #37-8-346. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Memoranda to Trustees and faculty on Baccalaureate and Commencement services from the Committee on Commencement Arrangements, 1960, 1963.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Carbon copy of President Malott's letter, November 4, 1957, inviting Wilbour Eddy Saunders, President of Colgate-Rochester Divinity School, to conduct the Cornell Baccalaureate Service on June 15, 1958; also two pamphlets giving program and information concerning the Service and Commencement Exercises.

relatedmaterial.head: RELATED MATERIALS
relatedmaterial.p: See also Cornell University student class printed memorabilia, #37-5-3019.

controlaccess.subject: Commencement ceremonies -- New York (State) -- Ithaca.
College students.
controlaccess.corpname: Cornell University -- : Students -- : New York (State) -- : Ithaca.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: "Uncritical Lovers, Unloving Critics" Commencement address by John W. Gardner and Commencement program

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Commencement address by James A. Perkins and Commencement program

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Instructions for the Academic Procession and the Commencement Ceremonies, Order of Proceedings for those taking part in the Conferring of Degrees, and Commencement Exercises and Investiture of the President. Includes pamphlet for the 1970 Commencement by the Committee of Concerned Seniors that discusses the Africana Studies Center fire, racism and financial inequality, Black Panthers, Vietnam War, Julius Stratton and MIT military work, excerpts from a poem, "Maybe the last time..." by Daniel Berrigan given during his Cornell farewell, info on the speaker Father David Connor, requests to contribute to Black Commitment Fund and to not wear a gap and gown to bring further awareness to these issues.

Class of 1964‡ The Cornell Daily Sun Commencement issue
